case_title: J.J. WHELAN VS. BARRY CAVALUZZI et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS RETURNED FILED BY PLAINTIFF WHELAN, J.J. ON DEFENDANT BROCK, ANGELA
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED AS TO DEFENDANT BROCK, ANGELA
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $30.83 FILED BY PLAINTIFF WHELAN, J.J.

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF WHELAN, J.J. AS TO DEFENDANT CAVALUZZI, BARRY BROCK, ANGELA DOES 1- 10 INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING STIPULATED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WHELAN, J.J. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CAVALUZZI, BARRY BROCK, ANGELA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 950 PINE ST., #106, SAN FRANCISCO $2,775.00 RENT, $342.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,117.00, STAYED UNTIL JUN-08-2003, LEASE FORFEITED, UNPAID BACK RENT $2775.00; UNLAWFUL DETAINER DAMAGES OF $30.83 PER DAY FROM 2-1-03 THRU 6-8-03; COSTS $342.00, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,138.64.
